Track / Week / Cards: unified top header with a single date/week control that stays pinned while you scroll.
Navigation: removed swipe-left/right day/week/month switching (use the arrows instead).
Track: add a per-day calorie target override to help you pace the week without changing macro targets.
Daily calorie target: collapsible panel (collapsed by default), with both a slider (10 kCal steps) and a typed number input (press Enter).
Daily calorie target: “Daily Goal” copy and improved card styling to match the theme.
